lines.gurmukhi: ਤੰਤੁ ਮੰਤੁ ਨਹ ਜੋਹਈ ਤਿਤੁ ਚਾਖੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tant mant neh johee tith chaakh na laagai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He is not affected by charms and spells, nor is he harmed by the evil eye. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਮਦ ਮਾਨ ਮੋਹ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਅਨਰਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh mad maan moh binase anaraagai |
lines.english: Sexual desire, anger, the intoxication of egotism and emotional attachment are dispelled, by loving devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨੰਦ ਮਗਨ ਰਸਿ ਰਾਮ ਰੰਗਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਨਾਗੈ ॥੨॥੪॥੬੮॥
lines.translit: aanand magan ras raam rang naanak saranaagai |2|4|68|
lines.english: One who enters the Lord's Sanctuary, O Nanak, remains merged in ecstasy in the subtle essence of the Lord's Love. ||2||4||68||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਵਸਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਕੈ ਜੋ ਕਹੈ ਸੁ ਕਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jugat vas prabhoo kai jo kahai su karanaa |
lines.english: The living creatures and their ways are in God's power. Whatever He says, they do.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਏ ਪ੍ਰਸੰਨ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਰਾਇ ਭਉ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਹੀ ਕਰਨਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhe prasan gopaal raae bhau kichh nahee karanaa |1|
lines.english: When the Sovereign Lord of the Universe is pleased, there is nothing at all to fear. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਕਦੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਚਿਤਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: dookh na laagai kade tudh paarabraham chitaare |
lines.english: Pain shall never afflict you, if you remember the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕੰਕਰੁ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਗੁਰਸਿਖ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jamakankar nerr na aavee gurasikh piaare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death does not even approach the beloved Sikhs of the Guru. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਹੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਹੋਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: karan kaaran samarath hai tis bin nahee hor |
lines.english: The All-powerful Lord is the Cause of causes; there is no other than Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਸਾਚਾ ਮਨਿ ਜੋਰੁ ॥੨॥੫॥੬੯॥
lines.translit: naanak prabh saranaagatee saachaa man jor |2|5|69|
lines.english: Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of God; the True Lord has given strength to the mind. ||2||5||69||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮ ਪਾਏ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਤਾ ਤੇ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਧਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bisraam paae mil saadhasang taa te bahurr na dhaau |1|
lines.english: Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I have found peace and tranquility; I shall not wander away from there again. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਨਾ ਨਾਠਾ ਦੁਖ ਠਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: simar simar prabh aapanaa naatthaa dukh tthaau |
lines.english: Remembering, remembering my God in meditation, the house of pain is removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦ ਸੂਖ ਮੰਗਲ ਬਨੇ ਪੇਖਤ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anad sookh mangal bane pekhat gun gaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am blessed with ecstasy, peace and happiness, gazing upon the Guru, and singing the Lord's Glorious Praises. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਆਪਨੇ ਚਰਨਨੑ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: balihaaree gur aapane charanana bal jaau |
lines.english: I am devoted to my Guru; I am a sacrifice to His Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੁਪ੍ਰਸੰਨ ਭਏ ਬਾਂਛਤ ਫਲ ਪਾਉ ॥੨॥੬॥੭੦॥
lines.translit: naanak prabh suprasan bhe baanchhat fal paau |2|6|70|
lines.english: O Nanak, God is totally pleased with me; I have obtained the fruits of my desires. ||2||6||70||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਥਾ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਰਾਗ ਨਾਦ ਧੁਨਿ ਇਹੁ ਬਨਿਓ ਸੁਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: kathaa keeratan raag naad dhun ihu banio suaau |
lines.english: This is my life's purpose, to sing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises, and listen to the vibrations of the sound current of the Naad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸ ਤੇਰੇ ਕੀ ਬੇਨਤੀ ਰਿਦ ਕਰਿ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: daas tere kee benatee rid kar paragaas |
lines.english: This is the prayer of Your slave: please enlighten my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮੑਰੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਤੇ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਦੋਖਨ ਕੋ ਨਾਸੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tumaree kripaa te paarabraham dokhan ko naas |1|
lines.english: By Your Mercy, O Supreme Lord God, please erase my sins. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਰਤਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਰਹਉ ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਘਟਿ ਸਾਸੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: keeratan naam simarat rhau jab lag ghatt saas |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I shall meditate in remembrance on the Praises of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, as long as there is breath in my body. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਕਾ ਆਸਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪੁਰਖ ਗੁਣਤਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal kaa aasaraa prabh purakh gunataas |
lines.english: I take the Support of Your Lotus Feet, O God, Primal Lord, treasure of virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਜਾ ਕੋ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਜਾਸੁ ॥੨॥੭॥੭੧॥
lines.translit: naanak prabh saranaagatee jaa ko niramal jaas |2|7|71|
lines.english: Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of God; His Praise is immaculate and pure. ||2||7||71||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਬੰਧਪ ਤੂਹੈ ਤੂ ਸਰਬ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: maat pitaa bandhap toohai too sarab nivaas |
lines.english: You are my mother, father and relative; You are abiding within all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਸਿਧਿ ਹਰਿ ਗਾਈਐ ਸਭਿ ਭਲਾ ਮਨਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sarab sidh har gaaeeai sabh bhalaa manaaveh |
lines.english: All perfect spiritual powers are obtained, when one sings the Lord's Praises; everyone wishes him well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੁ ਸਾਧੁ ਮੁਖ ਤੇ ਕਹਹਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਦਾਸ ਮਿਲਾਵਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saadh saadh mukh te kaheh sun daas milaaveh |1|
lines.english: Everyone calls him holy and spiritual; hearing of him, the Lord's slaves come to meet him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖ ਸਹਜ ਕਲਿਆਣ ਰਸ ਪੂਰੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਕੀਨੑ ॥
lines.translit: sookh sehaj kaliaan ras poorai gur keena |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru blesses him with peace, poise, salvation and happiness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਮਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਗੁਣੀ ਗਹੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: poor rahio sarabatr meh prabh gunee gaheer |
lines.english: He is permeating and pervading everywhere; God is the ocean of virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਸਗਲ ਦਇਆਲ ਭਏ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਚੀਨੑ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeea sagal deaal bhe har har naam cheena |1| rahaau |
lines.english: All living beings become compassionate to him; he remembers the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭਗਤ ਆਨੰਦ ਮੈ ਪੇਖਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਧੀਰ ॥੨॥੮॥੭੨॥
lines.translit: naanak bhagat aanand mai pekh prabh kee dheer |2|8|72|
lines.english: O Nanak, the devotees are in bliss, gazing upon God's abiding stability. ||2||8||72||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਸੁਣੀ ਦਾਤਾਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਹੋਏ ਕਿਰਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: aradaas sunee daataar prabh hoe kirapaal |
lines.english: God, the Great Giver, has become merciful; He has listened to my prayer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖਿ ਲੀਆ ਅਪਨਾ ਸੇਵਕੋ ਮੁਖਿ ਨਿੰਦਕ ਛਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raakh leea apanaa sevako mukh nindak chhaar |1|
lines.english: He has saved His servant, and put ashes into the mouth of the slanderer. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝਹਿ ਨ ਜੋਹੈ ਕੋ ਮੀਤ ਜਨ ਤੂੰ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਦਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: tujheh na johai ko meet jan toon gur kaa daas |
lines.english: No one can threaten you now, O my humble friend, for you are the slave of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅਨ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਬੀਆ ਨਹੀ ਹੋਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeean kaa daataa ek hai beea nahee hor |
lines.english: The One Lord is the Giver of all beings; there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮਿ ਤੂ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਦੇ ਅਪਨੇ ਹਾਥ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham too raakhiaa de apane haath |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God reached out with His Hand and saved you. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਬੇਨੰਤੀਆ ਮੈ ਤੇਰਾ ਜੋਰੁ ॥੨॥੯॥੭੩॥
lines.translit: naanak kee benanteea mai teraa jor |2|9|73|
lines.english: Nanak prays, You are my only strength, God. ||2||9||73||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੀਤ ਹਮਾਰੇ ਸਾਜਨਾ ਰਾਖੇ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: meet hamaare saajanaa raakhe govind |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe has saved my friends and companions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਦਕ ਮਿਰਤਕ ਹੋਇ ਗਏ ਤੁਮੑ ਹੋਹੁ ਨਿਚਿੰਦ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: nindak miratak hoe ge tuma hohu nichind |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The slanderers have died, so do not worry. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਕੀਏ ਭੇਟੇ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: sagal manorath prabh kee bhette guradev |
lines.english: God has fulfilled all hopes and desires; I have met the Divine Guru.
